creator: martin@matuska.org
text:
As miwi@freebsd.org showed me - there were more problems.

The port was not compatible anymore with (since 1.4.4 update) :
net-im/jabber-conference
net-im/jabber-jud
net-im/jabber-yahoo

Therefore changes again. Now it installs into lib/jabber and
include/jabber like jabber 1.4.3 did.
I will submit separate PR's for changing the three ports above.

Patch attached.

Updated files:
Patch:
http://www.matuska.org/martin/freebsd/ports/patches/net-im_jabber.patch
.tar.gz:
http://www.matuska.org/martin/freebsd/ports/patches/net-im_jabber.tar.gz
SVN: http://www.matuska.org/martin/cgi/viewvc.cgi/ports/net-im/jabber/
Tinderbox log: 
http://tinderbox.vx.sk/logs/6.2-FreeBSD-amd64/jabber-1.6.0,1.log
